The '''razor moss''' was a hardy plant indigenous to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] that inhabited the rocks of the planet. It had corrosive roots that broke down the crystalline structure of the [[Sandstone/Legends|sandstone]] outcroppings to extract the moisture contained within. [[Sandjigger]]s fed on the moss, as did [[cliffborer worm]]s. Razor moss was also known to be fed to [[Gorg/Legends|gorgs]] by [[Gragra/Legends|Gragra]] the [[Gorgmonger/Legends|gorgmonger]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Episode I Adventures 5: The Ghostling Children]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Episode I Adventures 6: The Hunt for Anakin Skywalker]]''
